title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: The talk argues that humans remain superior to AI at reliably editing word documents because AI struggles with the internal structure of formats like .docx, which operates like software rather than plain text. Scaling document editing at a computer-level requires treating documents as structured data with programmatic logic rather than simple files.
